title: potentilla glandulosa var. monticola
intro: Potentilla glandulosa var. monticola, also known as western five-spot or mountain potentilla, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla glandulosa var. monticola include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, fever, and skin conditions.
